message:
Command `echo "=== NETLIST EXISTS! Synthesis complete. ==="
echo "$(date)"

WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
echo ""
echo "=== All run steps so far ==="
ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | grep "^[0-9]"

echo ""
echo "=== New LR process (234246) ==="
ps -p 234246 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime,wchan 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== New Yosys (263197) ==="
ps -p 263197 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime,wchan 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== Synthesis reports ==="
ls -lh "$WRAPPER_RUN/02-yosys-synthesis/reports/" 2>/dev/null
echo ""
cat "$WRAPPER_RUN/02-yosys-synthesis/reports/"*.txt 2>/dev/null | head -40 || \
  cat "$WRAPPER_RUN/02-yosys-synthesis/reports/"* 2>/dev/null | head -40` executed with exit code 0.
